name: EGB OE TL.Z./KLOECKNER + CO
summary: Klöckner & Co is one of the largest producer-independent distributors of steel and metal products and one of the leading steel service center companies worldwide. Based in Duisburg, Germany, the company operates a network of distribution and service centers globally, providing a comprehensive range of products and services to customers in various industries. Klöckner & Co focuses on digitalization and supply chain optimization to enhance its value proposition.
